title: Odontarrhena cyprica
taxonomy: Odontarrhena cyprica is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Odontarrhena, which includes a few other species of plants. The classification of Odontarrhena cyprica is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Boraginales, family Boraginaceae, genus Odontarrhena, species O. cyprica. This plant is native to Cyprus. The classification of Odontarrhena cyprica is still being researched and confirmed by botanists.
constituents: Unfortunately, I do not have information on the active constituents of Odontarrhena cyprica.
intro: There is not enough information about the plant Odontarrhena cyprica.
